channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A year after founder Fred Smith’s death, FedEx’s CEO charts his own path
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Florida’s big tax cut plan assumes a level of migration that has already collapsed 90%
item.description: Net domestic migration into Florida dropped from 208,000 people per year during the pandemic to just 22,000 in 2025.

item.title: Kevin Ryan’s AlleyCorp raises new $335 million fund, all in on early-stage bets
item.description: Ryan discusses his new $335 million fund, the AI 'time warp' reshaping venture capital, and why changing your mind can be beneficial.

item.title: Oil price update for July 15, 2026
item.description: Changes in oil prices can impact energy costs and the price of everyday goods. Here is why.
